title: FreshVanilla (Actions and Stuffs JE)
description: A modpack focused on enhancing the vanilla Minecraft experience without changing the gameplay.
body:
![Fresh Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77e6535ec0c6a1d0c67a70a64571f26f5f5b9329_0.webp) ---
--- ## Overview Fresh Vanilla is a lightweight, aesthetic modpack focused on enhancing the vanilla Minecraft experience without changing the gameplay. It improves visuals, UI, animations, sounds, and overall immersion while staying 100% server-friendly and compatible with multiplayer.
Preview Gameplay preview's will be added shortly :D
--- ## Features - Cleaner and modern UI - Better sounds and surround audio - Immersive particles and effects - Animations for mobs, players, and tools - Performance optimizations - Shaders & resource packs support - Purely cosmetic — no gameplay changes --- ## Compatibility - Fully compatible with multiplayer servers - Does not require server-side installation - Works alongside most vanilla-compatible setups --- ## Performance Optimized to maintain smooth performance while improving visuals. Designed to run well on a wide range of systems, with optional support for shaders and resource packs. ---
Community & Support

Join the community to report bugs, suggest features, and stay updated.
